name: le-vibe-native-extension
description: First-party Lé Vibe agent surface for deterministic startup and local-first orchestration.

commands.title: Lé Vibe: Open Ollama Setup Help
Lé Vibe: Show Local Model Install Steps
Lé Vibe: Open Workspace Setup Workflow
Lé Vibe Chat: View transcript usage
Lé Vibe Chat: Add workspace context file
Lé Vibe Chat: Clear selected workspace context
Lé Vibe Chat: Emit operator handoff event

leVibeNative.openPanelOnStartup.description: Open the Lé Vibe readiness panel at startup.

leVibeNative.showFirstRunWizard.description: Show the Lé Vibe Chat first-run onboarding wizard (checkpointed, ends on the full readiness surface).

leVibeNative.devStartupState.description: Development override for startup readiness state until live Ollama wiring lands.

leVibeNative.useLiveOllamaReadiness.description: Use live local Ollama readiness checks instead of development state override.

leVibeNative.ollamaEndpoint.description: Local Ollama endpoint used for startup health and model list checks.

leVibeNative.ollamaTimeoutMs.description: Timeout in milliseconds for local Ollama startup probe requests.

leVibeNative.ollamaMaxRetries.description: Automatic retries for transient local Ollama failures (streaming and probes).

leVibeNative.ollamaRetryBackoffMs.description: Base backoff in milliseconds before retrying a transient Ollama failure (exponential).

leVibeNative.ollamaStreamStallMs.description: If no stream activity for this many milliseconds, cancel the request (prevents hangs).

leVibeNative.ollamaStreamMaxMs.description: Hard cap on total streaming duration for a single generate request.

leVibeNative.ollamaModel.description: Local Ollama model tag used for prompt streaming requests.

leVibeNative.chatTranscriptMaxBytes.description: Max on-disk size (bytes) for Lé Vibe Chat JSONL transcript before oldest-first compaction.

leVibeNative.chatTranscriptMaxMessages.description: Max number of transcript lines (JSONL rows) before oldest-first compaction.

leVibeNative.contextMaxFiles.description: Maximum number of workspace files that can be selected as prompt context.

leVibeNative.contextMaxCharsPerFile.description: Maximum number of characters captured from each selected context file.

leVibeNative.contextMaxLinesPerFile.description: Maximum number of lines captured from each selected context file.

leVibeNative.contextMaxTotalChars.description: Total prompt context character budget across all selected files.
